category_sources: Official homepage https://iredis.xbin.io/ describes IRedis as an interactive Redis terminal client.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal client for Redis with autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and navigation use IRedis.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides usage, installation, and feature documentation.
Official homepage is the project documentation surface and feature/installation guide.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page identifies laixintao/iredis as the IRedis source repository.
source_facts.repo was empty; official homepage links to the GitHub project.
tags_sources: Official README describes IRedis as a pure Python Redis CLI with autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
source_facts.description identifies Redis and terminal-client functionality.
